options.text: What if I get injured abroad? How do I file a claim?
How much money will I get if I get sick in a foreign country?
Can I get a refund if I cancel my trip?
Do I need to buy travel insurance?

content.explanation: 答案解析：正确答案"What if I get injured abroad? How do I file a claim?"准确反映了旅客的询问需求。其他选项"How much money will I get if I get sick in a foreign country?"、"Can I get a refund if I cancel my trip?"和"Do I need to buy travel insurance?"虽然都是相关的问题，但并未直接回答旅客关于理赔流程的询问。
content.scenarioHint: 旅客询问发生意外后如何申请理赔

options.text: Post photos on social media to prove the incident.
Contact the emergency assistance line and get a medical report if needed.
Wait for the insurance company to contact you — they’ll know automatically.
Pay for everything yourself and ask for reimbursement next year.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调了第一时间联系紧急援助热线并获取医疗报告，这是理赔流程的起点。选项1不专业，选项3错误地假设系统会自动追踪，选项4违背了及时申请的原则。
content.speakerText: I had an accident while hiking. What should I do first to claim insurance?
content.speakerTextCn: 我在徒步时出了意外，申请保险理赔第一步该做什么？

options.text: No, weather-related cancellations are never covered.
Yes, if you keep the hotel receipt and report it within 48 hours through the app.
Only if you booked through our website — otherwise, no claim is possible.
You need to file a police report for any travel disruption.

content.explanation: 正确答案指出���留收据并在规定时间内通过应用提交是关键，符合多数保险条款。选项1错误地绝对化了免责条款，选项3限制了预订渠道，选项4混淆了不同场景的理赔要求。
content.speakerText: My flight was canceled due to bad weather. Can I still claim for the hotel costs?
content.speakerTextCn: 我的航班因天气取消了，还能索赔酒店费用吗？
